case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MOAMED ALI BEN AHMED AMMAR et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMMAR, MOAMED ALI BEN AHMED ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2003
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARGARET DEL COTO, CSR #8493. (212)

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
